creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
FreeBSD 13.0-BETA4 introduced a regression that prevents the use of a disc1.iso hybrid image from being dd'd to a USB or similar device and booting, when the system is in BIOS/Legacy mode. It produces the error:

CD Loader 1.2

Building the boot loader arguments
Looking up /BOOT/LOADER... File not found
Looking up /boot/Loader... File not found
Boot failed
_

Experienced on:

ThinkPad X230 (multiple)
ThinkPad T430
ThinkPad T400
ACER 1410
Dell e5470

Confirmed on 13.0-RC1 through RC3.
